//: Bun-runtime config for the TUI (bun --tsconfig-override). Bun's native resolver applies these paths to EVERY react/react-dom import — including inside the @super-line/* binding packages, which otherwise resolve their own react@18 from packages/*/node_modules and emit Context.Provider elements the @opentui/react (React 19) reconciler rejects. Pinning the react family to the example's single react@19 copy is the bun equivalent of Vite's resolve.dedupe. Typecheck uses tsconfig.json instead (its react path targets @types/react).
